subject: fix(ui): truncate filter labels to 3 chars for compact header
body:
Fuel type shows first 3 chars (e.g. "ULP", "Die", "All"). Radius shows
number + "k" (e.g. "10k", "25k"). Full names kept in accessibility labels.
Removed maxWidth constraints since short labels no longer need them.

Impact: user-facing
